data-collection-services.h2: From Data Requirement to Delivered Dataset in 5 Steps

steps.title: Define Requirements
steps.desc: You tell us what data you need: sources, fields, format, frequency, and delivery method. We ask the right questions to scope the project accurately.

steps.title: Source Assessment
steps.desc: Our team assesses the target sources, identifies technical challenges (anti-bot measures, authentication, data structure), and confirms feasibility.

steps.title: Build and Configure
steps.desc: We build the extraction pipeline, configure validation rules, and run an initial test batch for your review before full-scale collection begins.

steps.title: Collect and Validate
steps.desc: Full collection runs with multi-stage validation: deduplication, format standardisation, accuracy checks, and removal of incomplete records.

steps.title: Deliver and Review
steps.desc: Datasets are delivered in your preferred format and frequency. You receive a delivery report, and we address any quality queries within 24 hours.

data-management-services.h2: From Fragmented Data to a Single Source of Truth

steps.title: Data Audit
steps.desc: We assess your current data state: sources, volumes, formats, quality issues, and integration requirements. You get a clear picture of what needs fixing and in what order.

steps.title: Scope and Rules
steps.desc: We agree on quality standards, validation rules, field requirements, output formats, and delivery method. Everything is documented before work begins.

steps.title: Initial Clean and Enrich
steps.desc: First pass: deduplication, standardisation, and enrichment on your existing data. You receive a sample for review before full-scale processing.

steps.title: Full Processing and Delivery
steps.desc: Full dataset processed, validated, and delivered in your preferred format. A quality report accompanies every delivery showing accuracy rates and changes made.

steps.title: Ongoing Management
steps.desc: Scheduled refresh cycles, continuous validation monitoring, and regular reporting keep your data current. You set the cadence, we maintain the quality.

document-processing-services.h2: From Document Receipt to Structured Data Delivery in 5 Steps

steps.title: Document Assessment
steps.desc: We review your document types, volume, current formats, and quality standards. You receive a clear scope and accuracy benchmark before any processing begins.

steps.title: Workflow Configuration
steps.desc: We configure extraction templates, validation rules, exception handling logic, and output format specifications for your document types.

steps.title: Test Batch
steps.desc: We process a representative sample (typically 50 to 100 documents) and share the output for your review before full-scale processing begins.

steps.title: Full-Scale Processing
steps.desc: Production processing runs with automated extraction, multi-layer validation, and human review for exceptions. Quality reports accompany every batch.

steps.title: Delivery and Review
steps.desc: Processed data is delivered in your required format and frequency. Any quality queries are addressed within 24 hours.

data-solutions-services.h2: From Data Requirement to Clean Delivered Records in 5 Steps

steps.title: Scope and Sample Review
steps.desc: You send us a sample of your source documents or data. We confirm data types, field requirements, accuracy standards, output format, and delivery frequency.

steps.title: SOP Documentation
steps.desc: We document your specific SOPs, validation rules, naming conventions, and any system-specific requirements. This is what your team uses from day one.

steps.title: System Access and Setup
steps.desc: We set up secure, role-based access to your platforms, templates, or file delivery systems. NDAs are signed before any data is accessed.

steps.title: Pilot Batch
steps.desc: We run a test batch of 200 to 500 records and deliver the output for your review. Any adjustments to format, accuracy standards, or workflow are incorporated before full production.

steps.title: Full Production and Reporting
steps.desc: Full-volume processing runs with multi-layer QA. You receive regular delivery reports showing accuracy rates, volumes processed, and any exceptions flagged.
